title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 10–11, this part follows Unknown person #10, Chopper, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #1, Jarul, Usopp as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You didn't!!! That nasty business didn't crop up again, did it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's okay, don't worry about me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is that place!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you... for everything you've done till NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait!! Hey, Mosa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gerchak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Beep... beep...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DAMN...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What are you lookin' at?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's nice to know that you somehow found...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...a friend to lean on in the realm of the dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DON'T YOU DARE TELL ANYONE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gerd!! You have to treat him!! It's Jarul!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's severely wounded!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this old timer's popular around here, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Good job saving him, chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: what!! He he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: P-Praising me doesn't make me happy or anything, ya jerk!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?! this old man?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're saying he was on the pirate King's crew?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He served as one of the pirate King's wings, alongside dark King Rayleigh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He was probably their third strongest member...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He really was a big shot pirate then, huh... no wonder he was tough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So thanks must know him too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just moved!! I think he's trying to say something... Jarul!! What is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I WAS. SECOND...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He couldn't let that comment slide!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: Jarul, I'm glad you're awake!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! Things up there are bad, Luffy!! We need you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What could put a man like him in this condition!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They've taken the kids hostage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's only a handful of enemies, but nobody can even make them budge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A bunch of enormous monsters are running Amok too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And on top of all that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UGH!!! hey now, this Haki is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: EeeeeeeeeekkkkkkkkkkkkkkkKKKKKKKK!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everybody, we need to get a lift up to the Sun realm right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What could be the source of this ridiculous burst of Haki?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf is in danger!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Chopper! That's enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I've got this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doga ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! You guys really will need my power now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're finally ready to go?!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
